name: Container Registry allows public network access
description: Public network access is enabled on this Azure Container Registry. This exposes the registry's REST API and data plane to the internet, increasing the risk of unauthorized access, credential brute-force, or exploitation of registry vulnerabilities.
remediation: Disable public network access and configure a private endpoint with Azure Private Link. Restrict registry access to VNet-integrated workloads (AKS, VMs) via the private endpoint. Use service endpoints or firewall rules as a transitional control.
